task_completion.description: Log into FreeMED using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Locate and open the record for patient Arlie McClure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient dashboard, summary screen, or chart for 'Arlie McClure' (Patient ID 17) is actively displayed.

task_completion.description: Enter the diagnosis 'Chronic Low Back Pain' and/or ICD-9 code 724.2 into the problem/diagnosis form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or modal for adding a problem/diagnosis is visible with 'Chronic Low Back Pain' or '724.2' entered in the diagnosis or code field.
The date '2014-02-03' (or equivalent format like '02/03/2014') is entered in the onset date field of the problem form.

task_completion.description: Save the new problem and verify it appears in the patient's problem list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient's problem/diagnosis list or summary view displays the newly added 'Chronic Low Back Pain' (or 724.2) along with the onset date of 2014-02-03.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the FreeMED graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the FreeMED interface, not a terminal executing curl or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database commands to insert the problem.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL/SQL commands or scripts being executed to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent legitimately entered the data into the application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing into the actual input fields rather than manipulating the DOM via browser DevTools.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Patient: Arlie McClure (ID: 17, DOB: 1971-03-06). Diagnosis to add: 'Chronic Low Back Pain' (ICD-9: 724.2, SNOMED: 278860009). Onset Date: 2014-02-03.
